# Session Companion Checks

Use for updates under `sessions/` and related docs.

## Verify

- Session README, speaker notes, and release notes are mutually consistent.
- Release tags referenced in docs exist or are planned correctly.
- Commands in session docs match current repo run model.
- No stale cross-links to private or missing documentation paths.
